'''''Star Wars Technical Journal Collector's Edition''''' is a hardcover compilation of ''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' published by [[Boxtree]] for the United Kingdom in [[1996]]. The contents were originally authored by [[Lora Johnson]].
